ModMetaData.name: Simple Ice Reworked Continued
ModMetaData.author: Sovereign,Alite
ModMetaData.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/0XkDp7r.png[/img] This mod adds simple ice blocks that can be used as stuffable material.
How is this different than the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2866750203]Original[/url] or the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3260493594]1.5 fork?[/url] While the original is outdated and had unresolved bugs, the fork does stray too far from the original vision.
This mod is lightweight and causes no performance issues. No Harmony ! The only c# in here locks the ice spot to the ice ground.
[h1]what is different in this version?[/h1]
Completely rewritten XML Ice does not randomly generate in weapons, structures or apparel. Instead of just getting blocks, you need a chunk first. Redid the art even if one can barely see the difference kek. ONLY Chunks and blocks are affected by temperature. ( anything else causes performance issues) Ice is no longer transparent as that caused issues with outlines.
[h2]It is now on permanent lifesupport![/h2]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/pcHakrT.png[/img]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/8tiIgCm.png[/img] [img]https://i.imgur.com/tcun3eM.png[/img]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/UJ5TK9u.png[/img]
Sovereign- XML, Art Alite- C#, lifesupport
[url=https://github.com/KonradHeinser/SimpleIceReworked][img]https://i.imgur.com/kTkpTOE.png[/img][/url]
